'''Spunchina''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]] known for its wild orgies. [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]] once participated in one of these orgies and survived.<ref name="betrayal">''[[Jabba the Hutt: Betrayal]]''</ref>

{{Planet-stub}}
